spans.content: S.-T. Yau College Student Mathematics Contests 2014
Please solve 5 out of the following 6 problems.
3. Prove that any bounded analytic function
f ^ { k } ( B _ { \epsilon } ( x ) ) \cap B _ { \epsilon } ( x ) \neq \emptyset
be a subharmonic function over a domain
\begin{array} { r } { \Delta u = \frac { \partial ^ { 2 } u } { \partial x ^ { 2 } } + \frac { \partial ^ { 2 } u } { \partial y ^ { 2 } } \ge 0 } \end{array}
\begin{array} { r } { \phi \in C _ { 0 } ^ { \infty } ( \mathbf { R } ^ { n } ) , \int _ { \mathbf { R } ^ { n } } \phi d x = 1 } \end{array}
f \in L ^ { p } ( \mathbf { R } ^ { n } ) , 1 \leq p < \infty
